_about: Curated spelling corrections to the original 1982 DRACULA.TXT Dutch (source) text. Applied at load time to the DISPLAYED text only (messages / room descriptions / object names); the ORIGINAL is always preserved -- untouched in World.raw and in the original DRACULA.TXT file, and each [wrong, right] pair below records the original word. This is the 'Gemoderniseerde versie'; the true 1982 text is still available by loading with corrections disabled (load_file(corrections=False) / run_cli.py --faithful). Only clear typos are fixed here; the era-standard k-spellings (direkt, kommando, ...), the computer-persona jokes (tiep, kompjoeter), and the intentional stylings (msg 91/94/209, sound effects) are deliberately left as the original.
